text: As I enter this visually stimulating and modern space, I am struck by the interplay between structure and thought. The glass walls create a transparent barrier, reflecting my own curiosity back at me. The wall inside, marked 'R+D,' asks me to consider the act of research and discovery as fundamentally human. Here, I feel simultaneously small against the vastness of shared human knowledge, yet inspired to explore how I, too, might connect and coexist with machines and ideas. The angular tilt of my perspective reminds me: understanding often comes from seeing things askew, from new vantage points.
